specialistMyPage.heroSub: How clients see you in the directory.
specialistMyPage.noBio: No public description yet — add one in Settings.

media.photoHint: Shown in the directory. Images are optimized to WebP to save bandwidth.
media.storageUnavailable: Image storage is not configured on this server.

directory.title: Discover
directory.intro: Browse specialists by category, compare ratings, and book in a few taps.
directory.hintInterests: Order uses your interests from Settings when you choose “For you”.
directory.hintGuest: “For you” boosts specialists you opened recently on this device.
directory.searchNoResults: No specialists match your search. Try other words or clear the search.

home.title: Book
home.bookingConflict: This date/time period is already occupied. Please pick another slot.
home.bookingFailed: Could not confirm booking. Please refresh and try another slot.
home.createSpecialistFirst: Create a specialist account first to load service-based availability.
home.directoryCategoriesAria: Categories this specialist is listed under

availablePeriods.title: Upcoming open times
availablePeriods.subtitle: Soonest bookable slots for the selected service. Tap a row to continue on the calendar.
availablePeriods.empty: No open times in the next two weeks for this service. Try another service or pick a day on the calendar.

bookingForm.title: Booking Details
bookingForm.pickTime: Pick a time on the calendar to continue.
bookingForm.slotConflict: This date/time period is already occupied. Select another slot.

calendarTab.selectServiceFirst: Select a service below before choosing a date and time.

serviceCarousel.title: Services Carousel
serviceCarousel.description: Choose a service before selecting a slot.

specialistHero.about: Dedicated specialist focused on personalized treatment plans, reliable follow-up, and clear communication for every client.

auth.signInSub: Use your email and password to continue.
auth.registerSub: Email and phone are required to book with confidence.

settings.title: Settings
settings.heroSub: Account details and specialist tools in one place.
settings.publicListingHint: Shown on your public page (/p/your-slug) and in search results.
settings.platformBody: Manage every specialist, service type, banner, and schedule from the Admin tab.
settings.clientHint: Discover specialists on Home and book from their page. Your visits appear in Agenda when you open it from a booking.
settings.interestsHint: Used to personalize the Discover tab (“For you” sort).
settings.workingHoursHint: Local time windows when clients can book.
settings.servicesHint: Offerings clients can book with you.
settings.languageHint: Applies to this device. API messages use the same preference.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.signInTitle: Sign in to see your agenda
agenda.signInBody: Specialists see upcoming appointments. Clients see bookings made while signed in.
agenda.adminBody: Use the Admin tab to manage all specialists, hours, banners, and service types.
agenda.scheduleLead: Plan the day with a timeline, or scan everything in list view.
agenda.visitsLead: See what’s ahead and switch between a day plan and a full list.
agenda.listIntro: Upcoming — oldest first within each day
agenda.clearScheduleHint: No sessions this day — use the time to prep or recharge.
agenda.emptySessionsHint: When bookings come in, they land here grouped by day.
agenda.hoursLoadHint: Check your connection and try again.
agenda.noAvailabilityHint: This specialist is not taking bookings on this day — pick another day.
agenda.hoursNotSetHint: This specialist has not published working hours yet.
agenda.pickTimeHint: Tap the timeline to choose a 30-minute slot.
agenda.chooseTimeline: Choose a start time — tap where you want to book

admin.title: Administration
admin.heroSub: Manage users, schedules, catalog, and marketing banners.
admin.assignCategoriesHint: Select categories for the chosen specialist.
admin.name: Name
admin.subtitle: Subtitle

sessionDetail.title: Session
sessionDetail.specialistRequired: Specialist sign-in required to view this session.
sessionDetail.agendaBookingRoleHint: Sign in with a client or specialist account to view this booking.
sessionDetail.notificationsHint: The server sends Firebase push (if the client registered an FCM token), email (SMTP), and SMS (Twilio) when those are configured.
sessionDetail.toastUpdated: Booking updated. Notifications sent when providers are configured.
